message:
style: rustfmt pass across all crates

Automated rustfmt reformatting with no semantic changes:

- Remove trailing spaces from #[must_use] annotations across all crates
- Reformat if let ... && guard chains to Rust 2024 edition brace style
- Merge split #[derive] attributes into single derive macros
- Break long function call chains and argument lists across lines
- Collapse single-use iterator chains to one-liners where cleaner
- Reorder imports alphabetically (vc_mcp, vc_query)
- Fix misindented doc comment in autogen.rs

Affected crates: vc_cli (lib, robot, schema_registry, toon, watch),
vc_guardian (autogen, autopilot, lib), vc_collect (mod, rch),
vc_mcp (lib), vc_oracle (dna, evolution, rate_limit),
vc_query (cost, lib), vc_store (lib), vc_web (lib),
vc_tui (lib, accounts, alerts, beads, events, guardian, machines,
mail, rch, sessions, theme, widgets)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+duckdb.workspace = true
